summary.reason: Core business workflows, recovery paths, build, lint, typecheck, and official E2E passed locally. Full aggregate `pnpm test` remains a local execution blocker because Vitest/jsdom startup across the whole suite exceeds the workstation timeout; RC-critical suites were run in smaller groups and passed.

evidence: tests/api/auth.test.ts: 6 passed
tests/e2e/workbench-auth-sync.spec.ts: desktop/mobile login, logout, manual key binding
screenshots: output/playwright/screenshots/unauthenticated-desktop.png, unauthenticated-mobile.png
tests/api/image-generations.test.ts: 15 passed
tests/api/image-edits.test.ts: 10 passed, including single image, multi-reference image, and PNG mask forwarding
tests/e2e/workbench-generation-events.spec.ts: desktop/mobile generation with task runtime events
tests/e2e/board-composer.desktop.spec.ts: Board export reference submits through Composer edits
screenshot: output/playwright/screenshots/board-composer-edits-desktop.png
tests/e2e/community-admin.desktop.spec.ts: generated task asset read back from /api/library
tests/api/library.test.ts: 6 passed
tests/e2e/community-admin.desktop.spec.ts: public work created from generated asset and visible on /community
tests/api/community-works.test.ts: 6 passed
tests/e2e/community-admin.desktop.spec.ts: detail page generated same-work draft
screenshot: output/playwright/screenshots/community-detail-same-desktop.png
tests/e2e/community-admin.desktop.spec.ts: report queue, feature, take-down, restore readback
tests/api/community-moderation.test.ts: 5 passed
screenshot: output/playwright/screenshots/admin-moderation-desktop.png
tests/api/workbench-version-nodes.test.ts: 5 passed
tests/api/image-generations.test.ts: context-aware generation creates version node
tests/api/image-edits.test.ts: context-aware edit creates child version node
tests/api/workbench-sync.test.ts: indexeddb fallback returns 503 with retry-after
tests/unit/workbench-cache-store.test.ts: 1 passed
tests/unit/workbench-outbox-store.test.ts: 1 passed
screenshots: output/playwright/screenshots/fallback-desktop.png, fallback-mobile.png
tests/unit/sync-engine.test.ts: keeps local outbox during server downtime and clears it after recovery
tests/api/workbench-sync.test.ts: idempotent replay, conflicts, tombstones, partial failure
tests/api/image-edits.test.ts: board_snapshot, board_document_id, board_export_asset_id stored on child version node
tests/unit/board-store.test.ts: save/get/list/soft-delete/hard-delete
tests/e2e/board-composer.desktop.spec.ts: snapshot source can be re-exported into Composer edit flow
tests/api/image-generations.test.ts: failed and canceled tasks sync to version nodes
tests/api/image-job-queue.test.ts: queued cancel and timeout reflect in task API
tests/api/batches.test.ts: failed batch item retry creates a new queued task with original params
tests/components/task-dock.test.tsx: terminal task log retry and runtime event UI

release_gates.notes: ESLint ignores generated output/.claude worktree directories; tsconfigRootDir pinned.
Script now uses `tsc --noEmit --incremental false` to avoid local tsbuildinfo write failures.
Full aggregate Vitest exceeded a 30 minute local timeout without stable output. RC-critical suites were split and passed.
8 Playwright tests passed in 10.5 minutes. Accepted dev-server warnings remain visible.

accepted_warnings: Next dev E2E logs `Fast Refresh had to perform a full reload` while all browser assertions pass.
Next dev E2E logs one `Unexpected end of JSON input` for /api/workbench/job-runtime-events after green assertions; production build did not fail.
Full aggregate `pnpm test` remains a local runner blocker; targeted RC suites passed and should be used until Vitest suite sharding/CI timeout is improved.
external_blockers: Staging/production must verify real Sub2API credentials instead of fake Sub2API.
Staging/production must verify live DATABASE_URL and REDIS_URL connectivity.
Production must use R2/S3/MinIO-compatible asset storage; local asset storage is intentionally a health-check failure under NODE_ENV=production.
SESSION_SECRET and KEY_ENCRYPTION_SECRET must be high-entropy, distinct, non-placeholder values.
